race.comment: BILLUND (3) comes up from Victoria fifth-up after defeating inferior opposition over 1200m at Cranbourne in good style with the claim. Can hold a forward position again with the senior rider going on. Ready for the trip and expected to go close. MARCHON (6) improving gelding who appreciated the class drop with a comfortable Maiden victory second-up over this journey at Canberra. Has further upside and shapes as a genuine top-three player. LAUREL HILL (2) tough mare near her peak for this. Warmed up late from near last on the turn with an eye-catching third over 1300m at Kembla Grange. Tempo suits and can play a leading role. MISS CAPITALE (7) deep into the campaign and stretches out to this trip for the first time. Held her ground to the line in a fast run contest when sixth over 1200m at Wyong. Keep safe.
